title: Tome V Act 12: The Curatrix Vault

story.text:
# 📖 Tome V Act 12: The Curatrix Vault
**act** · shared · narrative

Aria Silverhue places the artifact; the keeper shows what the collection has been holding for you.
> *The vault is full of curated reflections. The keeper shows you what the collection has been holding for you.*
